creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As nsayer@quack.kfu.com wrote:

> >Synopsis:       BOOT_PROBE_KEYBOARD hangs system in bootblocks

That's why it is an option, and not the default.  We _knew_ that it
tends to hang some odd machine (after hard experience when making this
the default case in some release), and had to back it out again.

Unless you find a way that works for your BIOS/keyboard combination
without breaking some other combination, it is not likely to be fixed
by somebody ever (since it's impossible without a machine that
experiences the problem).

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
